title: Create: Recipes++
description: A Mod Adding more recipes to the Create mod
body:
# Create: Recipes++

Welcome to Create: Recipes++. A mod aimed at adding recipes to the create mod that just make sense!

## Current Recipes:
### Shape Crafting:
4x charcoal -> 1x coal
3x leather, 1x tripwire hook -> 1x saddle

### Crushing:
1x limestone -> 25% copper nugget, 5% sand
1x scoria -> 25% zinc nugget

### Compacting:
1x coal block, 300mb lava -> 1x diamond

### Splashing:
1x coal -> 1x ink sac

### Haunting:
1x slime ball -> 90% magma cream, 10% slime ball

### Mixing:
2x andesite, 2x nether wart -> 1x netherrack [Heated]
2x andesite, 2x diorite, 50mb lava -> 2x tuff
